{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fire Giants
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Fire Giants]] are led by [[Sulthurus]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fire Giants]] are part of an alliance of creatures that use flame magic to extend their lives.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
